title: pentacalia cutervonis
intro: Pentacalia cutervonis, also known as the Cutervo Pentacalia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to the tropical Andes in Peru. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimalarial compounds, which can help treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Pentacalia cutervonis include reducing inflammation, fighting off malaria, and potentially alleviating symptoms of fever and pain. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
